iot.securityprofile.machinelearningdetec: The `MachineLearningDetectionConfig` property type controls confidence of the machine learning model.

iot.securityprofile.machinelearningdetec.Description: The model confidence level.  There are three levels of confidence, `"high"`, `"medium"`, and `"low"`.  The higher the confidence level, the lower the sensitivity, and the lower the alarm frequency will be.
